---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation

What problem does this feature solve, or what use case does it unlock? Why does the current behaviour fall short?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behaviour you'd like. If you have a sketch of the API, show it:

```r
# Example of what the new or changed function call might look like
result <- gent(zs, LD, new_arg = TRUE)
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Additional context

Papers, related issues, or data examples that support the request.
